name: SSH Brute Force Detection
description: Detects multiple failed SSH login attempts from the same IP address indicating brute force attack
query:
// SSH Brute Force Detection
// Triggers when more than 5 failed SSH attempts from same IP within 5 minutes
events from authentication
where event_type = "authentication_failure"
  and service = "ssh"
group by source_ip
having count(*) > 5
within 300 seconds
